digest.title: Aurora 1.5: Extending open foundation models for weather and Earth-system applications
digest.tldr: 5 adds 22 more variables, hourly temporal resolution, and probabilistic ensemble forecasting to the Aurora foundation model, making it more useful for real-world weather, climate, and energy applications.  5: Extending…

digest.title: Meta says its new AI model is ready to compete on coding
digest.tldr: After reentering the AI race with its first in-house Muse Spark model in April, Meta is now opening up the doors to developers with a new model that can plug into AI coding software with the new Meta Model API.

digest.title: Say hello to Claude Wrapped
digest.tldr: The popularity of Spotify Wrapped has kicked off a wide range of year-in-review features, on apps from YouTube to Uber - and now, the lookback trend has come to AI.
